description_long: This object is a decorative potted plant featuring a cluster of white orchid-like flowers with subtle pink accents, each flower rendered on flat, rectangular planes. The flowers are supported by several upright, slender stems that emerge from a dense arrangement of broad, dark green leaves. The leaves are thick, pointed, and radiate outward from the base, giving the plant a lush appearance. The plant is housed in a rounded, glossy black and white ceramic pot with a smooth finish and no visible decorative patterns. The overall design suggests a modern, minimalist aesthetic suitable for contemporary urban environments. No plant identification label or tag is visible on the pot or plant.
description: A modern potted orchid with white and pink flowers, broad green leaves, and a glossy black and white ceramic pot. The plant has a lush, decorative appearance ideal for indoor urban spaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full spread of white orchid flowers and the broad arrangement of green leaves in a glossy black and white pot.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the dense cluster of flowers and the layered leaves, with the pot's rounded shape visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the flower cluster and the overlapping leaves, with the pot's two-tone color more apparent.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the vertical stems and the side profile of the leaves and pot.
